Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 13th, 2007 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: August 7th, 2007 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 on appeal for sequences of terror and violence, and some sensuality (originally R)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Crime, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, House Arrest, Serial Killer, Single Parent, Unbelieving Police, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent

Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
